name: Taco Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, sour cream, taco mix, taco sauce, and milk together.
2. Spread mixture on serving dish.
3. Top with cheddar cheese, shredded.
4. Top again with half a head of lettuce, shredded.
5. Sprinkle with tomatoes cut into small cubes.
6. Refrigerate.
7. Serve with tortilla or nacho chips.
